v0.1.0-beta.description:
### Version 0.1 of the Teardown APWorld!!! 

This has many known bugs and missing features, but I feel it kinda works, so I'm posting it.
Expect semi-frequent updates, **Don't enter in long Asyncs!!!**

Follow the install directions in the Official Archipelago Discord, within the Teardown thread in Future Game Design



**Known Bugs/Missing Featues**

- /Missing Doesn't Work
- App says it's a text client when it's not
- Cash is saved between slots, never resets
- Items don't apply until the game is reloaded (Connect the client FIRST, then open)
- Client doesn't open the game (not a bug but I want it to)
v0.1.0-beta.title: Teardown Version 0.1.0

v0.2.0.description:
### Version 0.2 of the Teardown APWorld!!

This has many known bugs and missing features, expect it to show.
Expect semi-frequent updates, **Don't enter in long Asyncs!!!**

Follow the install directions in the Official Archipelago Discord, within the Teardown thread in Future Game Design


## Changes
- Mission Logic Added
- New Valuable Sanity
- Fixed All Missions Being Available
- Added Cash Tracking, (It's weird but should work)
- Added New Fillers
- Add option for Tool Upgrades
- Renamed options
- Changed randomize tools from taking away all tools to giving a new 3 tools
v0.2.0.title: Teardown Version 0.2.0

v0.2.2.description:
### Version 0.2.2 of the Teardown APWorld!!

This has many known bugs and missing features, expect it to show.
Working on 0.3.0 which will change installation instructions and give full game integration. Next update will be awhile, don't expect bug fixes. 

**Don't enter in long Asyncs!!!**

Follow the install directions in the Official Archipelago Discord, within the Teardown thread in Future Game Design


## Changes
- Minor yet client breaking bug fixed
- Redid installation slightly, now you download data folder, find the game's data folder, and just paste, overwriting the current files.
v0.2.2.title: Teardown Version 0.2.2
